requirement_topic.en: CEB Grid-Connection for Public and Commercial EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 公共和商业电动汽车充电设备的CEB并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: 公共和商業電動汽車充電設備的CEB併網要求

summary.en: Public and commercial EV charging stations connecting to the Sri Lanka grid require CEB approval for the grid connection under PUCSL regulatory oversight. CEB grid-connection requirements for EV chargers cover load demand notification, metering, power quality (harmonics and power factor), protection, and 50 Hz Sri Lanka grid compatibility. High-power DC fast chargers (50 kW and above) may require dedicated transformer or substation connections subject to individual CEB assessment. Residential chargers (Mode 2 or Mode 3 at low power) on existing household connections may not require separate CEB application but must comply with household electrical installation standards.
summary.zh: 接入斯里兰卡电网的公共和商业电动汽车充电站须在PUCSL监管下获得CEB并网批准。CEB对电动汽车充电设备的并网要求包括负荷需求通知、计量、电能质量（谐波和功率因数）、保护以及与50 Hz斯里兰卡电网的兼容性。大功率直流快充（50 kW及以上）可能需要独立变压器或变电站接入，须经CEB个案评估。住宅充电设备（低功率2模式或3模式）依托现有家庭用电接入的，可能无需单独申请CEB批准，但须遵守家庭电气安装标准。
summary.zht: 接入斯里蘭卡電網的公共和商業電動汽車充電站須在PUCSL監管下獲得CEB併網批准。CEB對電動汽車充電設備的併網要求包括負荷需求通知、計量、電能品質（諧波和功率因數）、保護以及與50 Hz斯里蘭卡電網的兼容性。大功率直流快充（50 kW及以上）可能需要獨立變壓器或變電站接入，須經CEB個案評估。住宅充電設備（低功率2模式或3模式）依托現有家庭用電接入的，可能無需單獨申請CEB批准，但須遵守家庭電氣安裝標準。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Electricity Act No. 20 of 2009 (as amended)
CEB grid-connection procedures for commercial loads and EV charging
PUCSL regulatory framework for distributed energy and new load categories
IEC 61851-1: Protection and power quality requirements for EV charging

summary.en: China's EV charging station grid-connection is governed by State Grid / Southern Grid enterprise standards and NEA distributed-load rules, using different metering, protection, and harmonics standards from CEB's Sri Lanka requirements. Chinese grid-connection approvals for EV charging stations have no standing under CEB procedures.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电站并网受国家电网/南方电网企业标准和国家能源局分布式负荷规则管理，计量、保护和谐波标准与CEB斯里兰卡要求不同。中国电动汽车充电站并网批准在CEB程序下无效。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電站併網受國家電網/南方電網企業標準和國家能源局分布式負荷規則管理，計量、保護和諧波標準與CEB斯里蘭卡要求不同。中國電動汽車充電站併網批准在CEB程序下無效。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid EV charging station connection requirements
NEA distributed-load and charging infrastructure rules

gap.en: Commercial and public EV charger operators in Sri Lanka must follow CEB's grid-connection application process, including power demand notification, metering installation, protection review, and harmonic compliance confirmation. Chinese grid-connection documentation for EV charging does not transfer. Exporters providing EV chargers for public charging station projects in Sri Lanka should confirm CEB technical requirements early in the project design phase.
gap.zh: 斯里兰卡的商业和公共电动汽车充电运营商须遵循CEB并网申请流程，包括电力需求通知、计量装置安装、保护审查和谐波合规确认。中国电动汽车充电并网文件不可转用。为斯里兰卡公共充电站项目提供电动汽车充电设备的出口商，应在项目设计阶段尽早确认CEB技术要求。
gap.zht: 斯里蘭卡的商業和公共電動汽車充電運營商須遵循CEB併網申請流程，包括電力需求通知、計量裝置安裝、保護審查和諧波合規確認。中國電動汽車充電併網文件不可轉用。為斯里蘭卡公共充電站項目提供電動汽車充電設備的出口商，應在項目設計階段儘早確認CEB技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for public and commercial EV chargers — CEB grid-connection approval required; residential low-power chargers on existing connections may not require separate application
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for public charging infrastructure in China under State Grid / NEA requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EV charger grid-connection documentation does not satisfy CEB requirements. Public and commercial EV charging station operators must follow CEB's application process for grid-connection approval in Sri Lanka.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电动汽车充电设备并网文件不满足CEB要求。斯里兰卡公共和商业电动汽车充电站运营商须遵循CEB并网批准申请流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電動汽車充電設備併網文件不滿足CEB要求。斯里蘭卡公共和商業電動汽車充電站運營商須遵循CEB併網批准申請流程。
